positive: A stylized arrangement of bioluminescent flora and gentle cosmic elements, featuring large, elegant crescent moons intertwined with stylized tropical leaves and glowing nebula swirls. The composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed as a powerful, clean silhouette print. Use a limited, vibrant color palette of deep indigo, ethereal teal, muted gold, and crisp white for maximum contrast. The artistic style should evoke a blend of Art Nouveau line work and modern celestial geometry, with smooth, vector-graphic edges and dramatic, flat contrast lighting. Highly detailed, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, noisy, messy, low contrast, photorealistic, grayscale, artifact, watermark, text, logos, trademarks, poor anatomy, out of frame, extra limbs
